instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that assigns a priority label (Low, Medium, High, Critical) from numeric `priorityLevel` using nested conditionals. Values outside 1–4 map to "Unspecified".
code: <#-- Model: priorityLevel: number (optional) --> <#assign level = priorityLevel!0> <#if level == 1>Low <#elseif level == 2>Medium <#elseif level == 3>High <#elseif level == 4>Critical <#else>Unspecified
